title: Redhead
writer: Vera Brown, Betty Burbridge, Jesse Lasky Jr.
actors: Bruce Cabot, Grace Bradley, Regis Toomey
plot: A girl marries a playboy from a rich family, expecting a life of comfort and luxury. However, her new father-in-law turns his ne'er-do-well son out into the street with no money, and promises the girl that if she can make a man ou...
